diagrams.title: Memory Layout of Array of Structures
diagrams.description: Shows how structure elements are stored contiguously in memory with member offsets
elements: Members within each structure have their own offsets
diagrams.purpose: Understanding memory allocation and efficient access patterns

diagrams.title: Accessing Members: Array Index vs Pointer
diagrams.description: Compares two methods of accessing structure members in an array
elements: Method 1: arr[i].member - direct access using index
Method 2: ptr->member - pointer access after ptr = arr
Pointer arithmetic: ptr+i moves i structures ahead
diagrams.purpose: Understanding equivalence between array notation and pointer notation
